currentRole: Documented single attack/damage orchestration authority; used by enhanced combat wrapper and Coup de Grace, but not by all live sheet attack paths.
futureRole: registered attack-resolution/damage-application authority; may remain below a thin CombatWorkflowRegistry
risk: If treated as already universal, live sheet paths will continue bypassing it and context will still split.
phase1Action: Do not delete. Add a registry adapter or wrapper that can call it when the workflow requires target-applied attack resolution. Decide in Phase 1B whether to route all attacks into it immediately or first preserve context around rollAttack().

currentRole: Minimal fallback action executor for combat:N, item abilities, Poison/Malkite, species/actor abilities, and Coup de Grace index handling.
futureRole: special-action fallback behind the workflow registry
risk: It is not currently broad enough to be the action-router SSOT.
phase1Action: Phase 1B should route to it only for action types it actually owns; do not force all combat actions through it yet.

currentRole: Strongest current live action router from the combat tab; routes full attacks, manual actions, attacks through Roll Configurator V2, skill actions, fallback engine/actor actions.
futureRole: UI caller only; should delegate to CombatWorkflowRegistry after Phase 1B
risk: If left as the router, PC/NPC/follower/droid/vehicle paths will drift and sheet code will keep accumulating rules.
phase1Action: Use it as the behavior inventory for the registry. Move routing decisions out of the sheet in small steps.

currentRole: Loads and normalizes combat action, extra skill use, ship combat action, and talent enhancement data.
futureRole: normalized action record source for CombatWorkflowRegistry
risk: Currently drops routing fields needed for later implementation phases.
phase1Action: Preserve routing metadata and infer safe defaults without hardcoding final mechanics.

currentRole: Source content for basic combat actions and action-cost notes.
futureRole: content/input source; not executable logic
risk: Some records encode compound action costs as prose/type strings rather than explicit structured costs.
phase1Action: Do not rewrite all data yet; allow mapper/registry to normalize into explicit action-cost objects.

currentRole: Pure action economy calculator.
futureRole: only authority for action availability/consumption math
risk: Phase 0 found likely RAW substitution/full-round seams; if not hardened, every action-costed feature is suspect.
phase1Action: Harden RAW logic in Phase 1B/1C, then route every spend through it.

currentRole: Stores and resets turn state on actor flags; tracks reactions and undo history.
futureRole: single persistence layer for action economy state
risk: Bypass paths can mutate or ignore action state.
phase1Action: Workflow registry should consume via ActionEngine and persist via this layer, not roll its own flags.

currentRole: Live roll/preroll dialog that gathers attack options, target/range/cover/concealment/situational/resource choices.
futureRole: returns normalized CombatContext fragments
risk: Current option names and missing controls cause context drift.
phase1Action: Do not replace. In Phase 2, normalize output through CombatContextBuilder.

currentRole: Most capable sheet-facing attack roll implementation; computes attack bonuses, target defense, options, and chat/damage button payloads.
futureRole: canonical attack roll function or adapter target underneath workflow registry
risk: Direct callers bypass action routing and context preservation.
phase1Action: Route attack actions to it through registry/context instead of direct sheet calls.

currentRole: Legacy/static SWSERoll API used by many callers; wraps attack/damage/full attack style behavior.
futureRole: adapter only; should call canonical workflow or canonical roll functions
risk: If it remains an independent implementation, duplicate attack/damage behavior will persist.
phase1Action: Do not delete. Mark direct imports as legacy consumers to migrate gradually.

currentRole: Feat/talent/attack-option modifier and legality resolver.
futureRole: registered option resolver fed by normalized combat context
risk: Metadata cannot activate if context names are inconsistent or missing.
phase1Action: Do not duplicate rules in the aggregator; feed this resolver correct context.

currentRole: Dedicated full attack/multiattack executor already used by character sheet when resolutionMode is fullAttack.
futureRole: registered workflow for fullAttack resolutionMode
risk: If action records do not preserve fullAttack routing, multiattack support remains unreachable.
phase1Action: Make registry route fullAttack actions here with preserved action package context.

currentRole: Pure damage resolution design: bonus HP, mitigation, HP, DT, CT, death/destroy/Force rescue result.
futureRole: canonical calculation target once damage packets are introduced
risk: If bypassed by flat damage paths, Stun/Ion/Sonic/Evasion/Bonus HP semantics will stay unreliable.
phase1Action: Do not force all damage through it in Phase 1A; preserve context now, migrate in damage-packet phase.

currentRole: Mutation-oriented damage applier using ActorEngine; simpler flat amount/type model.
futureRole: may become mutation bridge after DamageResolutionEngine calculates results
risk: Flat model cannot express special damage semantics.
phase1Action: Register as current mutation path, but do not expand it with more one-off semantics.

currentRole: Weapon damage formula roller and passive damage bonus calculator.
futureRole: formula-to-damage-packet builder or adapter
risk: Can drift from attack context unless called with preserved packet data.
phase1Action: Keep; require chat damage buttons to pass context instead of reconstructing.

currentRole: Manual selected-token damage/healing/condition UI utility.
futureRole: manual GM utility, not combat damage SSOT
risk: Direct use can bypass workflow context.
phase1Action: Do not route attack damage through it except explicit manual GM actions.

currentRole: Reusable ammo spend/reload/current/max helper.
futureRole: ammo and reload authority for combat, gear, and roll dialogs
risk: Ammo UI and attack gating will diverge if each tab calculates separately.
phase1Action: Register as resource workflow. Later obey trackBlasterCharges to hide all ammo UI when disabled.

currentRole: Combat status/cover/prone/fight defensively/full defense style resolver and display helper.
futureRole: reads canonical state records and returns defense/status view model
risk: If it also owns mutations while other paths own flags/effects, states will drift.
phase1Action: Do not replace; make it a consumer of canonical state context.

currentRole: Aggregates current conditions/effects for UI/status readouts.
futureRole: summary/combat display feed
risk: Cannot be the mutation authority for combat states.
phase1Action: Use for display only.

currentRole: Generic modifier collection/evaluation engine for domains such as attack, defense, bonus HP, etc.
futureRole: registered modifier source for attack/damage/state context
risk: Direct ad hoc bonuses in sheets bypass modifier governance.
phase1Action: Context builder should pass domains/context into ModifierEngine rather than computing new duplicate bonuses.

currentRole: Second Wind eligibility/healing/limits rules authority.
futureRole: registered workflow for secondWind/combatState actions
risk: Legacy second wind paths may bypass it.
phase1Action: Route Catch a Second Wind through registry -> ActionEngine -> SecondWindRules.

currentRole: Enhanced grapple workflow skeleton with grab, grapple check, pin, escape, effects, and chat cards.
futureRole: registered grapple workflow after RAW fidelity cleanup
risk: Replacing it would waste existing work; trusting it unchanged would preserve RAW seams.
phase1Action: Register as future workflow authority; do not expand until dedicated grapple phase.

currentRole: Variant/DC helper for grapple houserules.
futureRole: support helper called by grappling workflow if selected houserule requires it
risk: If used as workflow, it competes with SWSEGrappling.
phase1Action: Do not call directly from UI.

currentRole: Healing house-rule adapters and Treat Injury healing workflows.
futureRole: registered healing workflow after action routing exists
risk: Healing as negative damage would break Treat Injury, gear, cooldowns, droids, and persistent conditions.
phase1Action: Register later as healing workflow, not damage workflow.

currentRole: Actor repair helper/engine for droids or repair workflows.
futureRole: registered repair workflow for droids/devices/vehicles after action routing exists
risk: Organic healing paths may incorrectly repair droids if this is not separated.
phase1Action: Register later as repair workflow.

currentRole: Reaction registry/engine for Block, Deflect, Negate Energy style reactions.
futureRole: registered reaction workflow consuming attack/damage context packets
risk: Reactions cannot make Sonic/Evasion/Deflect decisions without preserved packets.
phase1Action: Keep; feed richer context later.

currentRole: Documented setting/house-rule access SSOT.
futureRole: all workflows read settings through this or its adapters
risk: Direct game.settings.get calls can disagree with defaults/adapters and governance warnings.
phase1Action: Registry/context builder should use HouseRuleService. Direct sheet reads should be migrated gradually.

currentRole: Governance mutation authority used by damage and sheet updates.
futureRole: single document mutation path underneath all combat workflows
risk: Direct actor.update/item.update creates race conditions and bypasses governance.
phase1Action: Aggregator should never mutate actor/item directly.

currentRole: Older UI adapter/wrapper around CombatEngine plus local card creation and damage helpers; globally exported as window.SWSECombat.
futureRole: compatibility adapter to workflow registry
risk: It creates another attack/damage card path if treated as current authority.
phase1Action: Do not delete. Mark as legacy caller to migrate behind registry.
